input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule V.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: v.4.1
            TITLE: wheel size

            CONTENT:
            rule V.4.1: Wheel Size
V.4.1 Wheel Size 
Wheels must be 203.2 mm (8.0 inches) or more in diameter.

final_answer: Wheels must be 203.2 mm (8.0 inches) or more in diameter.
